이사야 13:1.content: The burden of Babylon, which Isaiah the son of Amoz saw.

이사야 13:2.content: Set up a banner on the bare mountain! Lift up your voice to them! Wave your hand, that they may go into the gates of the nobles.

이사야 13:3.content: I have commanded my consecrated ones; yes, I have called my mighty men for my anger, even my proudly exulting ones.

이사야 13:4.content: The noise of a multitude is in the mountains, as of a great people; the noise of an uproar of the kingdoms of the nations gathered together! Yahweh of Armies is mustering the army for the battle.

이사야 13:5.content: They come from a far country, from the uttermost part of heaven, even Yahweh, and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land.

이사야 13:6.content: Wail, for Yahweh’s day is at hand! It will come as destruction from the Almighty.

이사야 13:7.content: Therefore all hands will be feeble, and everyone’s heart will melt.

이사야 13:8.content: They will be dismayed. Pangs and sorrows will seize them. They will be in pain like a woman in labor. They will look in amazement one at another. Their faces will be faces of flame.

이사야 13:9.content: Behold, the day of Yahweh comes, cruel, with wrath and fierce anger; to make the land a desolation, and to destroy its sinners out of it.

이사야 13:10.content: For the stars of the sky and its constellations will not give their light. The sun will be darkened in its going out, and the moon will not cause its light to shine.

이사야 13:11.content: I will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity. I will cause the arrogance of the proud to cease, and will humble the arrogance of the terrible.

이사야 13:12.content: I will make people more rare than fine gold, even a person than the pure gold of Ophir.

이사야 13:13.content: Therefore I will make the heavens tremble, and the earth will be shaken out of its place in Yahweh of Armies’ wrath, and in the day of his fierce anger.

이사야 13:14.content: It will happen that like a hunted gazelle, and like sheep that no one gathers, they will each turn to their own people, and will each flee to their own land.

이사야 13:15.content: Everyone who is found will be thrust through. Everyone who is captured will fall by the sword.

이사야 13:16.content: Their infants also will be dashed in pieces before their eyes. Their houses will be ransacked, and their wives raped.

이사야 13:17.content: Behold, I will stir up the Medes against them, who will not value silver, and as for gold, they will not delight in it.

이사야 13:18.content: Their bows will dash the young men in pieces; and they shall have no pity on the fruit of the womb. Their eyes will not spare children.

이사야 13:19.content: Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the beauty of the Chaldeans’ pride, will be like when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah.

이사야 13:20.content: It will never be inhabited, neither will it be lived in from generation to generation. The Arabian will not pitch a tent there, neither will shepherds make their flocks lie down there.

이사야 13:21.content: But wild animals of the desert will lie there, and their houses will be full of jackals. Ostriches will dwell there, and wild goats will frolic there.

이사야 13:22.content: Wolves will cry in their fortresses, and jackals in the pleasant palaces. Her time is near to come, and her days will not be prolonged.
